extensions.name: Market LLM
extensions.author: veritate
extensions.description: Byte-LLM market forecasting: hindcast, benchmark, and live decision support over price-series corpora.

extensions.name: Paper Trading
extensions.author: veritate
extensions.description: Paper-trade the Market LLM's forecasts with no capital: backtest, replay, or run forward on the live feed. Companion to the Market LLM extension.
